title: Add Metrics Navigation Tab to Dictionary and Migration Views
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want a Metrics tab added to the Dictionary and Migration navigation, so that I can quickly switch between Dictionary, Migration, and Metrics views from a single location.
description: A new Metrics navigation tab with a dedicated icon was added to the object-level navigation alongside Dictionary and Migration. The tab order was also reorganized to place Metrics in the desired position. This provides a unified navigation experience for users working across data dictionary, migration, and metrics views.
acceptance_criteria: A Metrics tab with the correct icon appears in the object-level navigation
Tabs are ordered according to the specified layout
Clicking the Metrics tab navigates to the Metrics view
Dictionary and Migration tabs continue to function correctly
ux_changes: Added a Metrics navigation tab with an icon to the object-level view. Reordered the tab layout to position Metrics alongside Dictionary and Migration.
implementation_notes: The metrics icon was provided by the product owner. The tab was added to the shared navigation component used by Dictionary and Migration views.
comment_summary: Product owner urgently requested this for an upcoming demo. Developer implemented the tab addition promptly.
